title: Gem Imports Halloween Fake Blood Drop Mini Bottles - Pack of 6
features: Looking to take a Halloween costume to the next level? These blood drop mini bottles are designed to mimic wounds and cuts with a realistic look and feel for the ultimte finishing touch of gore to any Halloween look.
Ingredients: Aqua, Propylene Glycol, Polysorbate 80, Cellulose Gum, Triethanolamine, Phenoxyethanol, Methylparaben
Please Note: Not suitable for children under 3 years old. Not recommended for children under 7 years old. Adult supervision required. For external use only.
